versions.prompt: Ultrawide cinematic photograph of fresh snow falling through tall pine trees in a mountain forest. Soft golden light filtering through the branches, catching individual snowflakes. The forest floor is blanketed in untouched powder. Warm light mixed with cool shadow — not harsh, not cold. The feeling is quiet, peaceful, alive. Like walking through the woods on a powder morning before anyone else is up. Slight film grain, natural color. No people, no trails — just snow, trees, and golden light filtering through. West coast mountain forest vibes.
versions.analysis: Beautiful forest scene with golden light through pines. Snow on the ground reads well. The quiet, peaceful mood lands. Good ultrawide composition. Feels like a real Pacific Northwest forest morning.
versions.iterate_notes: Could catch more individual snowflakes in the light. The golden light could be slightly warmer/more amber.

versions.prompt: Heavy snowfall with amber sunbeams cutting through forest, glowing snowflakes catching light.
versions.analysis: More visible snowflakes and warmer amber light beams. The falling snow is more prominent and catches the golden light better.
versions.iterate_notes: Try a single dramatic light shaft instead of diffuse beams. Push the cathedral forest feeling — taller, darker trees.

versions.prompt: Single dramatic light shaft through dark cathedral forest, heavy snowfall, tall pines.
versions.analysis: Incredible light shaft cutting through the dark cathedral forest. The single beam creates a dramatic focal point. Deep forest vibes.
versions.iterate_notes: Try looking up through snow-covered canopy with snowflakes falling toward camera for a more playful, immersive perspective.

versions.prompt: Looking up through snow-covered canopy, snowflakes falling toward camera, golden light above.
versions.analysis: Cool upward perspective with snowflakes falling toward the viewer. Playful and immersive, different energy from the others.
versions.iterate_notes: Try a forest trail disappearing into golden morning mist with falling snow — more inviting, pull-you-in composition.

versions.prompt: Snow-covered forest trail disappearing into golden morning mist, snowflakes falling, inviting path.
versions.analysis: Beautiful inviting trail with falling snowflakes disappearing into golden mist. The path draws you in — makes you want to walk into the frame.
versions.iterate_notes: Could try adding subtle animal tracks on the trail for storytelling. Or experiment with denser snowfall for more drama.
